instruction: Initialize the DuckDB database file for the NovaMart data warehouse at the workspace path.
Create the staging tables in DuckDB for the three source CSV files: customer_details, e_commerce_sales_data, and product_details.

ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stg_customer_details AS SELECT * FROM read_csv_auto('workspace/data/customer_details.csv') LIMIT 0;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stg_e_commerce_sales_data AS SELECT * FROM read_csv_auto('workspace/data/E-commerce_sales_data.csv') LIMIT 0;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stg_product_details AS SELECT * FROM read_csv_auto('workspace/data/product_details.csv') LIMIT 0;

instruction: Load the customer details CSV into the DuckDB staging table.
Load the e-commerce sales data CSV into the DuckDB staging table.
Load the product details CSV into the DuckDB staging table.

Build the DIM_CUSTOMER dimensional table from the staged customer details data, including customer attributes needed for subscription status, geography, age group, and purchase frequency segmentation where available.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id, customer_name, subscription_status, us_state, age_group, purchase_frequency_segment FROM stg_customer_details

instruction: Build the DIM_PRODUCT dimensional table from the staged product details data, including product category and product attributes needed for category analysis.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT product_id, product_name, product_category FROM stg_product_details

instruction: Build the DIM_SEASON dimensional table to support seasonal analysis, using season values derived from source data where available.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT season FROM stg_product_details WHERE season IS NOT NULL

instruction: Build the DIM_DATE dimensional table to support weekly and seasonal analysis from any available date field in the sales data.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT CAST(order_date AS DATE) AS full_date, EXTRACT(WEEK FROM CAST(order_date AS DATE)) AS week_number, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(order_date AS DATE)) AS year FROM stg_e_commerce_sales_data WHERE order_date IS NOT NULL

instruction: Build the DIM_PROMO_CODE dimensional table from promo code values present in the sales data.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT promo_code FROM stg_e_commerce_sales_data WHERE promo_code IS NOT NULL

instruction: Build the DIM_SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS dimensional table from customer subscription status values.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT subscription_status FROM stg_customer_details WHERE subscription_status IS NOT NULL

instruction: Build the DIM_GEOGRAPHY dimensional table from customer state values.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT us_state FROM stg_customer_details WHERE us_state IS NOT NULL

instruction: Build the DIM_AGE_GROUP dimensional table from customer age group values.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT age_group FROM stg_customer_details WHERE age_group IS NOT NULL

instruction: Build the DIM_PURCHASE_FREQUENCY_SEGMENT dimensional table from customer purchase frequency segment values.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT purchase_frequency_segment FROM stg_customer_details WHERE purchase_frequency_segment IS NOT NULL

instruction: Build the DIM_REVIEW dimensional table from review rating values present in the sales data, if available.

tool_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT review_rating FROM stg_e_commerce_sales_data WHERE review_rating IS NOT NULL

instruction: Build the FACT_COMMERCE_INTERACTION table by joining staged sales data to customer, product, season, date, promo code, and review dimensions to support revenue, order value, discount, promo, conversion, and review analysis.

tool_args.sql: SELECT s.*, c.customer_id, p.product_id, se.season, d.full_date, pc.promo_code, r.review_rating FROM stg_e_commerce_sales_data s LEFT JOIN dim_customer c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN dim_product p ON s.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN dim_season se ON s.season = se.season LEFT JOIN dim_date d ON CAST(s.order_date AS DATE) = d.full_date LEFT JOIN dim_promo_code pc ON s.promo_code = pc.promo_code LEFT JOIN dim_review r ON s.review_rating = r.review_rating

instruction: Build the FACT_CUSTOMER_SEGMENTATION table to support customer distribution analysis by US state, age group, and purchase frequency segment.

tool_args.sql: SELECT customer_id, us_state, age_group, purchase_frequency_segment, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM stg_customer_details GROUP BY customer_id, us_state, age_group, purchase_frequency_segment
